## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Verification

- [ ] `cd api && npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd api && npm test`
- [ ] `cd api && npm run build`
- [ ] `cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `cd ui && npm run build`
- [ ] docs-only change

## Risks

- user-facing impact
- migration or compatibility concerns
- follow-up work, if any
